title: add kore design assets, arena plan, and ci korczewski build
description:
## Summary
- Adds the Kore Design System latest/ reference assets (HTML previews, JSX showcases, fonts, PNGs) for the korczewski brand
- Adds the 2026-05-11 arena-foundation superpowers plan
- Adds homepage-anon.png screenshot artifact
- Adds Zone.Identifier WSL ADS files to .gitignore
- Carries forward the auto build & deploy website to korczewski CI workflow commit

## Test plan

- [ ] No regressions on web.mentolder.de or web.korczewski.de
